value: {"challenger_thesis": "The marketing team's desire to avoid negative press leads to no major visionOS announcement at WWDC 2026, regardless of engineering capability.", "changed_actor_variants": {"marketing_team": [{"variant_id": "visionos_27_keynote_dropped", "state": {"beliefs": ["announcing visionOS 27 would generate negative press due to platform abandonment reports"], "goals": ["minimize reputational risk", "avoid amplifying negative narratives"], "stances": ["opposed to major visionOS announcement"], "pressures": "high sensitivity to media and public perception"}, "evidence_basis": "unstated", "support": "plausible"}]}, "changed_assumption": "The marketing team's preference for avoiding negative press overrides engineering readiness or strategic signaling, leading to no announcement.", "unchanged_note": "everything else identical"}
